Source.description: Path to the JavaScript file (relative to config location)

ObjectToInterop.description: JavaScript expression to the object to generate interop for (e.g., 'window.blazorInterop')

Output.description: Output file path (relative to config). If omitted, uses AddSource instead

ClassName.description: Name of the generated C# static class

Namespace.description: C# namespace for the generated class. Defaults to the project's root namespace

Init.description: JavaScript statements to execute before evaluating the source (e.g., 'window={}')

InvokeVoidString.description: Format string for void invoke calls. {0} = method name, {1} = args

InvokeString.description: Format string for typed invoke calls. {0} = method name, {1} = args
